title: ExecutionRequestPayload
description: Payload for execution_request family v1. Transport artifact carrying a bounded execution request from FA Local through the proving-slice pipeline for operator review and approval.

request_id.description: UUID of the original FA Local execution request.

correlation_id.description: Lineage correlation UUID spanning the full execution chain.

requester_identity.description: Identity string of the requesting agent or service.

requested_capability_id.description: UUID of the specific capability being requested.

requested_side_effect_class.description: Class of side effect this execution request will produce.

authorization_class.description: Authorization class determining the required approval path.

intent_summary.description: Concise machine-readable statement of execution intent.

requested_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the execution request was originated.

operator_summary.description: Plain-language summary for the operator review surface.

execution_plan_id.description: Optional UUID of the bounded execution plan if one was pre-computed.

capability_context.description: Optional human-readable context about the requested capability.
